profile.name: RedApe
profile.title: Executive Director, Cloud Platform Engineering
profile.summary: Forward-thinking technology executive with 20+ years of experience architecting resilient, high-performance cloud ecosystems. Proven track record of scaling enterprise engineering teams, leading digital transformation initiatives, and delivering mission-critical platforms to market.

roles.title: Executive Director, Cloud Platform Engineering
roles.description: Lead global platform engineering strategies, orchestrating cloud-native transformations and establishing standardized architectures that accelerate developer velocity.
highlights: Architected multi-region Kubernetes deployments scaling to millions of daily active users.
Reduced infrastructure operational costs by 35% through advanced observability and auto-scaling.
Grew and mentored an organization of 150+ elite software engineers.

roles.title: Senior Director of Architecture
roles.description: Spearheaded the design of next-generation distributed transaction systems, focusing on low-latency, high-throughput architectures.
highlights: Pioneered the corporate transition from monolithic legacy systems to microservices.
Delivered a real-time event-streaming platform processing 50B+ events monthly.
Authored the technical blueprint for SOC2 compliance across all engineering disciplines.

roles.title: Principal Architect / Tech Lead
roles.description: Early foundational engineer focused on building robust back-end systems. Transitioned from individual contributor to defining enterprise-wide patterns.
highlights: Led the migration to public cloud infrastructure.
Designed and implemented zero-downtime deployment pipelines.

speaking.topic: The Future of Cloud-Native Banking Architectures
Scaling Kubernetes in Highly Regulated Environments
